ideas.title: Add a wasm32 compile gate to self-improve BEFORE the deploy gate
ideas.why: The skip-link ship passed the deploy gate but broke 'Build WASM' in CI (declined/needs-review tail), and CI success is only 0.77 — the gate never actually compiles the WASM target it ships.

ideas.title: Path-filter telemetry-only commits out of the CI build workflow
ideas.why: The autofix Opus diagnosis showed a 'Build WASM' failure was investigated against a commit containing only regenerated activity/brain/coverage/deploy JSON — machine metrics are triggering full builds, wasting CI and inflating the 4 recent failures.

ideas.title: ⌘K command palette: fuzzy-jump to any post, tag, or the ~/factory tab
ideas.why: The site has posts, tags and a live factory view but no fast discovery layer — a Vercel/Linear-style palette turns a tech demo into a destination people navigate by muscle memory.

ideas.title: Shift the cheap self-improve/idea-engine calls onto the two idle Spark GB10 nodes
ideas.why: Router shows cloud_hard=193 vs spark_today=3 while both spark GPUs sit at util=0 / 9-12W — the factory is paying cloud for work its own idle hardware could absorb.

ideas.title: Live 'Ask the Factory' terminal on the ~/factory tab wired to brain_state.json
ideas.why: brain_state.json + brain_metrics.py already expose the autonomous loop's internals, but visitors can only watch static vitals — a queryable terminal (static replay now, brain-backed later) is a one-of-a-kind interaction no other blog has.

ideas.title: WebGL/canvas knowledge graph of posts linked by shared tags
ideas.why: 214 commits/7d of content is accumulating with no map of how it connects — a force-directed graph (like Obsidian's graph view or Maggie Appleton's digital garden) is the memorable 'whoa' interaction that earns a bookmark.
